data_type_evidence: The main paper-facing run loads real datasets with `load_dataset("imdb", split="train[:2000]")`, `load_dataset("ag_news", split="train[:2000]")`, and `load_dataset("glue", "sst2", split="train[:2000]")` in `experiments_sonnet45/2026-05-18_06-11-49_sparse_routing_peft_attempt_0/logs/0-run/experiment_results/experiment_44109726c2524d12962587f240549da1_proc_71381/experiment_code.py:300,305,310`.

The same main run uses DistilBERT via `AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained("distilbert-base-uncased")` and `AutoModel.from_pretrained(...)` in `.../experiment_44109726c2524d12962587f240549da1_proc_71381/experiment_code.py:77,87`, matching a real-data HuggingFace workflow rather than a synthetic generator.

Ablation runs referenced by the figure aggregator also load the same real datasets: `experiment_0afbe67b.../experiment_code.py:382,387,392`, `experiment_e70ff0c0.../experiment_code.py:319,324,329`, `experiment_26574e42.../experiment_code.py:322,327,332`, and `experiment_40a1c599.../experiment_code.py:338,343,348`.

The main run saves actual outputs with `np.save(..., "experiment_data.npy")` in `.../experiment_44109726c2524d12962587f240549da1_proc_71381/experiment_code.py:429`; the saved file contains experiment results for `imdb`, `agnews`, and `sst2` with metrics/loss histories.
